name: GOLFTEC South Lake Union
about: GOLFTEC is a premier golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. Utilizing advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, their certified coaches provide personalized feedback to help golfers of all skill levels improve their swings. The studio offers structured lesson programs, practice memberships with access to training bays, and expert club fittings using top brands like Callaway and TaylorMade to optimize performance and distance.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced motion capture technology (OPTIMOTION) for precise swing analysis
Data-driven club fittings gaining an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Structured, personalized improvement plans led by PGA-certified coaches

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used but specific brands/models not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though many students prefer to use their own clubs for personalized fitting and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, suggesting outside food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Virtual simulator play time isn't specified, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on pace and activities.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Junior programs are available, but specific kid-friendly amenities or policies aren't detailed in the provided information.
